name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- Bumped the Premiere extension release line to `1.8.4`.
- Refined the compact shell layout and top navigation so the panel reads closer to the intended editorial UI direction.
- Added proxy request history and live status tracking for queued proxy jobs returned by VideoVault Connect.
- Updated the shipped extension version to `1.8.4`.
- Added `Info` and `History` subsections under the proxy area.
- Showed proxy-request rows with file path plus current state such as waiting, processing, or done.
- Improved proxy lookup compatibility so the panel can understand both same-name proxy outputs and legacy `_Proxy` suffix outputs.
- Extension version bumped to `1.8.4`.
- Update `extensions/adobe-premiere/latest.json` in `videovault-release-updates` after packaging the new macOS and Windows installers.
- Release tag should follow:
- `premiere-extension-v1.8.4`
